relationships.from: lignum aloes, ambra, mirra, olibanus albus

summary: This chunk details several magical mirror and crystal rituals from the Munich Handbook (CLM 849), including two versions of the Speculum Floron for revelation, a third method using mirrors in Jupiter-Venus conjunction, and the First Mirror of Lilith (Lylet) for divination. It also includes rituals for invisibility (using a black cat born in March), theft/murder detection via crystal or boy’s gaze, and Pluto’s Key to open locks. Ritual ingredients include calibe mirrors, balsam, aloes, amber, myrrh, white frankincense, human blood, cat organs, elyotropia seeds, and mixed mel/lac/vinum. Incantations are largely in pseudo-Chaldaic or Latin with divine names (Alpha et O, Sabaoth, Emanuel). Timing follows planetary days (Venus, Friday) and lunar phases (waxing moon).
key_passages: O Floron, in speculo sicut solitus es apparere citissime respondeas.
Coniuro vos demones vt veniatis et compareatis et dicatis michi de quocumque interrogauero vos omnem veritatem, in nomine Patris et Filij et Spiritus Sancti. Amen.
Studeas invenire vnam cattam nigram, natam in mense Martij, et exviscera earn... Sapreson lampsones sampsanay, invisibilis fiat homo.
Coniuro te, puer, • per Patrem et Filium et Spiritum Sanctum... vt quidquid tu videos nobis insinues...
Sume tibi ferrum inventum ex inprouisu, et fac tibi fieri clauem huiusmodi, factam die Veneris.
